item.text: The automated suites passed, so there’s no reason to touch any tests. I’m adding a short throwaway verification script in `/tmp` that reads the current `VideoEditorShell.tsx`, extracts the actual `condensed` expression, checks the three required cases, runs it once, and then removes it.
